name: landing
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTP: GET /p/{id} + POST /p/{id}/resolve via landing API (CloudFront /p/*); reads Dynamo: Recommendation, RuntimeConfig, FxRate
outputs (invocations / data writes): Returns SSR page / attributed URL; emits impression+click funnel log lines (picked up by CW Logs subscription)

name: member-catalog
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTP: app API routes (customer JWT; /config + /healthz public); reads Dynamo: Product, Recommendation, FxRate, RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Sync-invokes retailer-linkgen; writes Dynamo: Recommendation, OpsCounters (presence)

name: member-wallet
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTP: app API /wallet* + /healthz/db (customer JWT); reads Aurora wallet_entry (as wallet_reader); reads Dynamo: FxRate, RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Writes Dynamo: OpsCounters (presence). Read-only on money

name: admin-console
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTP: admin API actions + Dynamo views (employee JWT); reads Dynamo: RuntimeConfig, UnattributedOrder, OpsCounters, Product, Recommendation, OtpSink, FxRate; Cognito customer-pool reads (ListUsers/AdminGetUser); SecretsManager DescribeSecret (retailer)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Sync-invokes audit-writer (audit-or-fail) + fx-rates; writes Dynamo: RuntimeConfig (sole writer), UnattributedOrder, OpsCounters, Recommendation (DeleteItem + #counter UpdateItem only, no PutItem); Cognito admin mutations; SecretsManager PutSecretValue (retailer, write-only)

name: admin-ledger-view
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTP: admin API record-reads (employee JWT); reads Aurora wallet_entry + audit_log (as ledger_reader); reads Dynamo: FxRate, RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read-only; returns money stats / audit feed / per-user wallet

name: retailer-linkgen
inputs (triggers / data reads): Sync invoke from member-catalog; reads SecretsManager retailer secret; reads Dynamo: RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Calls AliExpress affiliate API (HTTPS egress); writes Dynamo: Product (sole writer); returns affiliate link

name: retailer-settlement
inputs (triggers / data reads): EventBridge Scheduler 15-min heartbeat; reads SecretsManager retailer secret; reads Dynamo: PollerState, GuestAttribution, Recommendation, UnattributedOrder, RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Calls AliExpress order API (HTTPS egress); sync-invokes ledger-writer (sole money-path caller); writes Dynamo: PollerState, UnattributedOrder, Recommendation (UpdateItem-only: absolute conversion-total SETs); emits funnel log lines

name: ledger-writer
inputs (triggers / data reads): Sync invoke from retailer-settlement only
outputs (invocations / data writes): Writes Aurora as ledger_writer: INSERT wallet_entry (append-only) + EXECUTE audit_append; returns absolute conversionTotals; emits conversion funnel log lines. Zero Dynamo

name: audit-writer
inputs (triggers / data reads): Sync invoke from admin-console; async invoke from post-confirmation
outputs (invocations / data writes): Writes Aurora as audit_writer: EXECUTE audit_append only (hash-chained audit_log)

name: otp-sender
inputs (triggers / data reads): Cognito CUSTOM_SMS_SENDER trigger (customer pool); KMS Decrypt of the OTP; reads Dynamo: RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Sends WhatsApp via End User Messaging Social (eu-central-1) or SMS via SNS direct-to-phone; writes Dynamo: OtpSink

name: post-confirmation
inputs (triggers / data reads): Cognito POST_CONFIRMATION trigger (customer pool)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Async-invokes notification-sender (welcome) + audit-writer (user_registered); writes Dynamo: GuestAttribution, OpsCounters

name: notification-sender
inputs (triggers / data reads): Async (Event) invokes from producers (post-confirmation; later retailer-settlement); reads Dynamo: RuntimeConfig (kill switch)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Sends WhatsApp via End User Messaging Social; after 2 async retries failures land in its SQS DLQ (real payloads)

name: fx-rates
inputs (triggers / data reads): EventBridge Scheduler 12h + sync invoke from admin-console; reads Dynamo: RuntimeConfig
outputs (invocations / data writes): Fetches ECB/BoI rates (HTTPS egress); writes Dynamo: FxRate (sole writer)

name: db-migrator
inputs (triggers / data reads): Custom::Trigger per deploy (ordered AFTER role-bootstrap)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Runs SQL migrations on Aurora as wanthat_migrator (DDL + grants); throw fails the deploy

name: role-bootstrap
inputs (triggers / data reads): Custom::Trigger per deploy (after cluster; BEFORE migrator)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Connects to Aurora as wanthat_master via IAM token (password auth is PAM-dead since 0003); CREATE ROLE/GRANT rds_iam/schema USAGE for the four service roles (idempotent)

name: trigger-provider
inputs (triggers / data reads): CloudFormation Custom::Trigger resources during deploy
outputs (invocations / data writes): Invokes role-bootstrap then db-migrator; propagates their failures to CFN (deploy rollback)

name: cross-region-export-writer
inputs (triggers / data reads): CFN deploy of stacks exporting values to us-east-1 (landing API id; identity client ids)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Writes SSM parameters in us-east-1 for the EdgeStack to read

name: cross-region-export-reader
inputs (triggers / data reads): Reads the SSM parameters written above during EdgeStack deploys
outputs (invocations / data writes): Resolves cross-region refs (CloudFront origin + /config.json values)

name: s3-auto-delete-provider
inputs (triggers / data reads): Bucket deletion during dev stack teardown (autoDeleteObjects)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Empties dev buckets so DESTROY removal succeeds

name: bucket-deployment
inputs (triggers / data reads): Deploy-time: SPA build assets + generated runtime config.json
outputs (invocations / data writes): Writes objects into the SPA bucket + CloudFront invalidation

name: aurora-cluster
type: Aurora Serverless v2 (PostgreSQL 16; 0-2 ACU scale-to-zero; IAM auth; no RDS Proxy; storage encrypted)
inputs (triggers / data reads): IAM-token connections from: member-wallet, admin-ledger-view, ledger-writer, audit-writer, db-migrator, role-bootstrap
outputs (invocations / data writes): Money-only schema; writer instance + parameter group (max_connections=50) + subnet group in the isolated VPC

name: wallet_entry
type: Aurora table (append-only ledger; keyed by cognito_sub)
inputs (triggers / data reads): INSERT by ledger_writer only; SELECT by wallet_reader + ledger_reader
outputs (invocations / data writes): Immutable rows; (order_id,kind,status) unique index (idempotency); partial index on recommendation_id (conversion totals); balance always derived

name: audit_log
inputs (triggers / data reads): Appends ONLY via SECURITY DEFINER audit_append (EXECUTE: audit_writer + ledger_writer); SELECT by ledger_reader
outputs (invocations / data writes): Tamper-evident chain (prev_hash/entry_hash); advisory-lock serialized

name: Product
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by retailer-linkgen (sole)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by member-catalog, admin-console

name: Recommendation
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by member-catalog (CRUD), retailer-settlement (total SETs), admin-console (erasure Delete + #counter)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by landing, member-catalog, retailer-settlement, admin-console

name: GuestAttribution
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by post-confirmation (guestId->sub claim)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by retailer-settlement (attribution)

name: PollerState
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by retailer-settlement (watermark)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by retailer-settlement

name: UnattributedOrder
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by retailer-settlement (sightings), admin-console (claim/dismiss)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by both (admin queue + settle sweep)

name: RuntimeConfig
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by admin-console (sole writer)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by nearly every Lambda (kill switches + tunables)

name: OpsCounters
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by member-catalog, member-wallet, post-confirmation, admin-console
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by admin-console (stats)

name: FxRate
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by fx-rates (sole)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by landing, member-catalog, member-wallet, admin-console, admin-ledger-view

name: OtpSink
inputs (triggers / data reads): Written by otp-sender (every code)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by admin-console (GET /admin/otp-sink)

name: app-http-api
type: API Gateway HTTP API + customer-pool JWT authorizer
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTPS from SPA (Bearer; CORS allowlist; throttle 500/1000)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Integrations -> member-catalog + member-wallet

name: admin-http-api
type: API Gateway HTTP API + employee-pool JWT authorizer
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTPS from admin SPA (Bearer ID token; throttle 50/100)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Integrations -> admin-console (actions/catch-all) + admin-ledger-view (4 record-read routes)

name: landing-http-api
type: API Gateway HTTP API (public; no authorizer)
inputs (triggers / data reads): HTTPS from the CloudFront /p/* origin (throttle 2000/4000)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Integration -> landing

name: cloudfront
inputs (triggers / data reads): Browser HTTPS (apex/dev domain)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Default -> SPA bucket; /p/* -> landing API (caching disabled); 403/404 -> index.html; WAF attached

name: spa-bucket
inputs (triggers / data reads): BucketDeployment writes (SPA build + /config.json)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Served exclusively through CloudFront

name: funnel-bucket
inputs (triggers / data reads): Firehose delivery
outputs (invocations / data writes): Glue/Athena reads (partition projection)

name: firehose-funnel
type: Kinesis Data Firehose (wanthat-{env}-funnel; + delivery IAM role)
inputs (triggers / data reads): CW Logs subscription filters on landing, retailer-settlement, ledger-writer log groups
outputs (invocations / data writes): Batched funnel events -> analytics bucket

name: logs-subscriptions
type: CloudWatch Logs subscription filters (x3; + CWL-to-Firehose role)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Structured JSON funnel lines from the three emitters
outputs (invocations / data writes): Stream to Firehose

name: glue-athena
type: Glue database + funnel_events table / Athena queries
inputs (triggers / data reads): Reads funnel S3 objects
outputs (invocations / data writes): Funnel SQL (impressions -> clicks -> conversions)

name: customer-user-pool
type: Cognito user pool (phone alias; passwordless SMS-OTP + native WEB_AUTHN passkeys; ESSENTIALS; PII in attributes)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Browser calls cognito-idp public API directly; admin-console admin ops; fronted by the regional WAF
outputs (invocations / data writes): Triggers otp-sender (via KMS-encrypted code) + post-confirmation; issues customer JWTs

name: customer-pool-client
inputs (triggers / data reads): SPA auth flows (USER_AUTH)
outputs (invocations / data writes): JWTs consumed by the app API authorizer + landing's offline JWKS verify

name: employee-user-pool
type: Cognito user pool (email + password + mandatory TOTP)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Admin browser via Managed Login (OAuth code + PKCE); operator provisioning (first-admin runbook)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Issues employee JWTs for the admin API authorizer

name: employee-pool-client+domain
type: Cognito app client + hosted Managed Login domain (branded)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Admin SPA redirect flow
outputs (invocations / data writes): OAuth code exchange -> tokens

name: custom-sender-kms-key
inputs (triggers / data reads): Cognito encrypts each OTP to it
outputs (invocations / data writes): otp-sender kms:Decrypt (sole consumer)

name: retailer-secret
inputs (triggers / data reads): admin-console PutSecretValue (write-only) + DescribeSecret
outputs (invocations / data writes): Read by retailer-linkgen + retailer-settlement only

name: aurora-master-secret
inputs (triggers / data reads): Created by RDS/CDK
outputs (invocations / data writes): UNUSED at runtime (master password auth PAM-disabled since 0003; role-bootstrap uses IAM tokens); credential of record only

name: order-poll-heartbeat
type: EventBridge Scheduler rate(15 min) + dedicated invoke role
inputs (triggers / data reads): Time
outputs (invocations / data writes): Invokes retailer-settlement

name: fx-rates-schedule
type: EventBridge Scheduler rate(12 h) + dedicated invoke role
inputs (triggers / data reads): Time
outputs (invocations / data writes): Invokes fx-rates

name: notification-sender-dlq
inputs (triggers / data reads): Lambda async on-failure destination (after 2 retries; real payloads)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Operator inspection/redrive

name: sns-sms
inputs (triggers / data reads): otp-sender sns:Publish (NotResources on topic ARNs)
outputs (invocations / data writes): SMS delivery; account MonthlySpendLimit cap (sandbox: $1)

name: eum-social-whatsapp
inputs (triggers / data reads): otp-sender + notification-sender SendWhatsAppMessage (scoped phone-number-id/*)
outputs (invocations / data writes): WhatsApp delivery via Meta

name: alarm-topic
inputs (triggers / data reads): CloudWatch alarms
outputs (invocations / data writes): Emails to dennis@ + jonatan@wanthat.app

name: cw-alarms
inputs (triggers / data reads): Per-Lambda errors (13 alarmed fns - db-migrator + role-bootstrap excluded by design), API 5xx (x3 surfaces), Aurora connections (80% of 50), SMS spend (80% of cap)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Publish to alarm topic

name: cw-dashboards
inputs (triggers / data reads): Lambda errors/throttles/p95 (registry-ordered), API metrics, CloudFront/edge metrics
outputs (invocations / data writes): Operator view

name: log-groups
type: CloudWatch log groups (one explicit per Lambda; dev 1-mo/DESTROY; prod 6-mo/RETAIN)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Lambda stdout/stderr (delivered out-of-band; works from the endpoint-free VPC)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Post-mortems; three feed the funnel subscriptions

name: xray
type: AWS X-Ray (active tracing on all Lambdas)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Trace segments
outputs (invocations / data writes): Service map + latency analysis

name: vpc
type: VPC (2 AZs; PRIVATE_ISOLATED subnets + route tables; NO NAT; no interface endpoints)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Hosts Aurora + the 6 in-VPC Lambdas
outputs (invocations / data writes): No internet egress by construction

name: ddb-gateway-endpoint
inputs (triggers / data reads): In-VPC Lambdas' DynamoDB traffic
outputs (invocations / data writes): Routes to DynamoDB without internet

name: lambda-sg / aurora-sg
type: Security groups (cross-stack; descriptions immutable by team rule)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Lambda SG -> Aurora SG :5432 is the only ingress path
outputs (invocations / data writes): Aurora unreachable from anywhere else

name: cloudfront-waf
inputs (triggers / data reads): CloudFront viewer requests
outputs (invocations / data writes): Rate-based + managed rules at the edge

name: cognito-waf
type: WAF web ACL (REGIONAL; associated to the customer pool)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Unauthenticated Cognito ops (SignUp/InitiateAuth/RespondToAuthChallenge)
outputs (invocations / data writes): Rate-based abuse control (replaced the phone-velocity table)

name: acm-cert
inputs (triggers / data reads): Route 53 validation records
outputs (invocations / data writes): TLS for CloudFront (wanthat.app / dev.wanthat.app)

name: route53
inputs (triggers / data reads): CDK-managed record writes
outputs (invocations / data writes): CloudFront alias records (apex + dev); prod DnsStack: Zoho MX/SPF/DKIM/DMARC/verification

name: iam-execution-roles
type: IAM roles (one per Lambda; least-privilege per function)
inputs (triggers / data reads): Assumed by lambda.amazonaws.com
outputs (invocations / data writes): Carry each function's exact grants (incl. rds-db:connect per PG role: wallet_reader, ledger_reader, ledger_writer, audit_writer, wanthat_migrator, wanthat_master)

name: github-oidc-deploy
type: GitHub OIDC provider + per-env assume-only deploy roles
inputs (triggers / data reads): GitHub Actions deploy.yml (merge->dev; release->prod behind the prod Environment gate; workflow_dispatch break-glass)
outputs (invocations / data writes): cdk deploy --all with no static keys; drift-guard reconcile by stack prefix

name: cdk-bootstrap
type: CDKToolkit bootstrap stack (staging S3 bucket + CDK roles)
inputs (triggers / data reads): cdk deploy asset publishing
outputs (invocations / data writes): Stores synthesized assets the deploy roles read
